title: Allergan moves Botox into Phase 3, despite mid-stage failure
summary: Allergan announced that its Phase 2 trial of Botox (onabotulinumtoxin A) for major depressive disorder failed to show statistical significance at either the 30-unit or 50-unit dose on the MADRS scale. Despite the null result, Allergan plans to advance Botox into a Phase 3 program, betting that a larger late-stage trial with the lower dose will achieve clinical significance.
